name: Hoeksche Waard (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the 'HW' municipal logo and the name 'gemeente Hoeksche Waard'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Hoeksche Waard in the province of South Holland, formed in 2019. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the 'HW' logo and wordmark 'gemeente Hoeksche Waard'
